summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Italian Tactical Periodization Academy. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend authentication, dashboard, payment flow, and admin panel all functional. Core user journeys from registration to payment confirmation working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend APIs - 100% success rate (31/31 tests passed)
Admin login with admin@periodizzazione.it / TatticaPT2024! working
Student registration via frontend creates accounts successfully
Dashboard displays all 7 modules (MODULO 01-07) with Italian titles
Progress tracking shows '1 di 18 lezioni completate' correctly
Payment page displays 49 EUR price correctly
PayPal payment button with correct URL (49EUR)
Payment confirmation button 'Ho effettuato il pagamento' works
Payment success page shows 'Benvenuto nel Percorso Completo'
Admin panel 'Pannello Istruttore' shows comprehensive stats
Student list displays payment status ('Non pagato' for unpaid)
AI Chat 'Chiedi al Maestro' interface functional
All Italian content and labels displaying correctly
Authentication flows and session management working
Module navigation and lesson structure visible
Landing page loads with proper hero section
Registration form with Name, Email, Password fields working
Admin dashboard shows 7 Allievi, 7 Moduli, 18 Lezioni, 5 Esercitazioni
Payment info API returns correct 49 EUR and PayPal email
Lesson access control API working for free vs premium lessons
